items.markdown:
An AI receptionist is `an automated virtual assistant that answers phone calls, answers business FAQs, qualifies leads, and schedules appointments in real time` . Using advanced natural language processing (NLP), it provides human-like interactions 24/7, eliminating hold times and missed calls.[](https://www.ionos.com/momentum/ai-receptionist) [[1]](https://www.ionos.com/momentum/ai-receptionist)[[2]](https://www.withallo.com/blog/ai-receptionist)[[3]](https://www.yeastar.com/blog/what-is-a-virtual-receptionist/)

Top AI Receptionist Platforms

Several dedicated platforms and tools cater to different industries and business sizes:

- **[Retell AI](https://www.retellai.com/use-cases/receptionists):** Specializes in ultra-fast, natural AI phone agents, including specialized setups for medical and dental practices.[[1]](https://www.retellai.com/use-cases/receptionists)
- **[Allo](https://www.withallo.com/blog/ai-receptionist):** A mobile-friendly phone system with a built-in AI assistant, ideal for small businesses needing affordable routing and scheduling.
- **Smith.ai:** Offers a hybrid model that blends AI with live human agents, great for lead screening and complex CRM integrations.[[1]](https://www.withallo.com/blog/ai-receptionist)
- **[Yeastar AI Receptionist](https://www.yeastar.com/voip-phone-system-feature/ai-receptionist/):** Deep, built-in AI capabilities designed to automatically route calls and pull data from an internal knowledge base.

Key Benefits

- **24/7 Availability:** Answers calls outside business hours or when your team is away from the desk.
- **Automated Scheduling:** Integrates directly with your calendar (e.g., Google Calendar, Cal.com) to book or modify appointments.
- **Lead Qualification:** Automatically captures caller details and sends you instant, summarized transcripts via email or CRM.
- **Multi-language Support:** Intelligently identifies and responds to callers in their preferred language.[](https://www.ionos.com/momentum/ai-receptionist) [[1]](https://www.ionos.com/momentum/ai-receptionist)[[2]](https://bookipi.com/ai-receptionist/)[[3]](https://www.withallo.com/blog/ai-receptionist)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X2ETrCx8XP0&t=3)[[5]](https://help.yeastar.com/en/p-series-software-edition/ai-guide/ai-receptionist-overview.html)

How to Build Your Own Modern low-code and no-code tools allow businesses to build and deploy highly customized AI receptionists without developer skills.For a step-by-step tutorial on how to build and configure a custom AI receptionist in minutes using ChatGPT:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSf5qlk8ip3Pgbg85GhAW3vqRkrlA_0TWkuUt_vhpHvaGPSkIQN)
1m[Build an AI Receptionist in 2 Minutes using ChatGPT![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041516-1876-0139-0000-50278a6a86a1:8)
![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041516-1876-0139-0000-50278a6a86a1:9)
Retell AI YouTube · 10 Mar 2026](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X2ETrCx8XP0) If you want to integrate phone capabilities seamlessly alongside automated email and SMS follow-ups:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn2.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcT6kFCN_J3vmciTnwyk-bLUYB7LjY86ILvl5MP8eAd59bYvM5pe)
57s[How To Build An AI Receptionist For A Trades Business![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041516-1876-0139-0000-50278a6a86a1:10)
![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041516-1876-0139-0000-50278a6a86a1:11)
Brendan Jowett YouTube · 29 Aug 2025](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oNvSCvyfoY4&vl=en)
